subject: Alex is live & killin' it! Hop on!
body:
It's Leila, I stole Alex's email.

Just wanted to let you know Alex is live on youtube & crushing it!

You can still watch him live right now:

Use this link to join!

Thank you so much - I appreciate you.

Leila

PS - Alex has talked about this every day for years. I know what he has planned. Trust me, you don't want to miss it. :)
